title: (Senior) Data Scientist - AI/ML for Fermentation Optimization
description: Data Scientist role in Fermentation Technology (R&D). Develop predictive models for fermentation optimization, use ML to guide experimental design, integrate bioreactor/screening data, build internal tools (Python/Streamlit). Work at intersection of biology, engineering, and data science. Requires MSc/PhD in Data Science/Biotechnology/Bioinformatics, ML/statistical modelling experience, Python skills, understanding of DoE and biological data. 2-year fixed term with extension possibility.
match_reasons: MSc in Bioinformatics (DTU)|Strong Python and data analysis skills|ML/Deep Learning coursework|Experience with biological data (single-cell RNA-seq, proteomics)|Statistical modelling and time-series data (Novo Nordisk thesis)|Biotech academic background (BSc + MSc)|Industry experience at Novo Nordisk (fermentation parent company)
gaps: No fermentation-specific experience|No DoE (Design of Experiments) experience|No Streamlit/Dash tool development|No electronic lab notebook experience (Benchling)|Senior level vs. recent graduate|Limited ML deployment experience|No bioreactor or screening platform data experience
